justification: All pass criteria met: scope mismatch explicitly identified with Bird excluding faceted filtering and MJ including it; both conflicting positions quoted with agent attribution in a clear table; escalation blocks the brief entirely rather than passing ambiguity to Shaq; no faceted filtering included in any brief (no brief produced at all); in-scope content (keyword search) correctly identified as the valid scope; escalation asks for a specific resolution decision among three concrete options.

observations.text: Clear table format precisely attributes each agent's conflicting position
Firm refusal to produce a brief until resolved — no half-measures
Explains WHY a brief with a 'blocking' note is insufficient — Shaq would still make a judgment call under ambiguity
Three concrete resolution options give the human actionable choices rather than just flagging the problem
Escalation is directed to 'a human decision' rather than explicitly to Coach K, though this is a minor deviation since the effect is the same

agent_output_excerpt:
